sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Jump Plates
special_mechanics.description: Jump plates launch vehicles into the air, providing additional acceleration for those not at full speed

special_mechanics.name: Dash Zones
special_mechanics.description: Dash zones greatly increase the racer's speed on the ground

special_mechanics.name: Super Jet Boost
special_mechanics.description: Approximately four-second speed boost awarded for completing each lap; player can save up to three at a time

special_mechanics.name: Vehicle Damage System
special_mechanics.description: Each machine has a power meter that decreases when colliding with land mines, track sides, or other vehicles

tier_notes: Tier 1 classification based on empirical/qualitative data. Source is Wikipedia article which provides game mechanics overview but lacks detailed physics parameters. No ROM addresses or exact numerical values for movement, gravity, or sub-pixel systems are documented in available source material.
